heading: Safety standards
label: 6304 Safety standards
notes: Effective DateSection effective , see , set out as a note under .July 1, 1997section 23(2) of Pub. L. 104–272section 6301 of this title

children.text: A physical examination of each boxer by a physician certifying whether or not the boxer is physically fit to safely compete, copies of which must be provided to the boxing commission.

Except as otherwise expressly provided under regulation of a boxing commission promulgated subsequent to , an ambulance or medical personnel with appropriate resuscitation equipment continuously present on site.October 9, 1996
A physician continuously present at ringside.
Health insurance for each boxer to provide medical coverage for any injuries sustained in the match.
